Excellent stand of wild blackberries.  Access is difficult, located between City Wastewater Treatment Plant and City Police Firing Range.  On City owned land, but access might be restricted. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
Several mature pecan trees between public library and Chamber of Commerce building. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Older pecan trees in rear of fitness center lot. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
